title: Canopy Growth Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Canopy Growth reported Q4 FY2024 consolidated net revenue of $73 million, representing 16% organic growth compared to the prior year. The company achieved a consolidated gross margin of 21% in Q4, compared to 11% the previous year. Q4 adjusted EBITDA loss: $15 million (63% improvement YoY). Free cash flow: -$23 million outflow (75% improvement YoY). Full-year gross margin: 27% (cash gross margin: 35%). Cash position: >$200 million post-quarter adjustments. Debt reduction: >$1.1 billion since fiscal 2023. Canada Cannabis: Revenue increased 4% YoY to $37 million in Q4. Medical sales grew 16%, while adult-use B2B declined 4%. International Markets: Sales surged 32% YoY with triple digit sales growth in Poland and double-digit growth in Germany. Storz & Bickel: Revenue climbed 43% YoY to $22 million, driven by strong demand for the new Venty portable vaporizer. Management highlighted cost reduction achievements of $280 million against a target of $270 million to $300 million.
